# EquiPulse AI 

EquiPulse AI is an offline-first, AI-powered SME POS and ERP system built for cooperative ecosystems.

## Context
- Domain: POS, ERP, SME
- Technologies: React, Vite, TypeScript, Firebase, DuckDB WASM, Gemini API, Ollama

## App Architecture
- Local-first architecture using IndexedDB persistence via Firebase.
- DuckDB WASM handles complex CSV ingestion and parsing in-browser.
- Gemini 1.5 Flash provides multimodal analytics, OCR, and forecasting.
- Local Ollama fallback for strict offline areas.
